_comment: Claude Beacon configuration. Edit and save; changes apply to the next notification (no rebuild needed).

timeouts._comment: Seconds before a notification auto-dismisses when you're away. 0 = never (stays until you focus its terminal or click).

notifications._comment: Notification-event handling. suppressTypes lists Notification .type values that should NOT raise a panel - subagent lifecycle (e.g. a subagent finishing) fires one per action and floods otherwise. Real prompts (permission_prompt, idle_prompt, ...) and unknown types still show. Flip debugLog to true to append every raw hook payload to state/debug-payloads.log so you can see the exact .type values your setup emits and tune this list.

stacking._comment: When more than `threshold` panels are alive and none has been acted on for `delaySeconds`, they collapse into a single macOS-style stack you click to fan open (it re-collapses after another idle period). A brand-new panel peeks on its own for `peekSeconds` before joining.

_sound_comment: macOS system sound name (Glass, Ping, Hero, Submarine, Pop, Tink, ...). Empty string = silent.

accent._comment: Hex color of the left accent stripe per kind.

_color_comment: Every *Color field takes a hex like #FFFFFF. Empty string = system default (adapts to light/dark).

buttons._comment: label = the button text. backgroundColor = the button fill. textColor = the label color. Empty backgroundColor = system accent (focus) / default (dismiss).
